help.advanced.adaptiveAi.content: The Adaptive AI engine detects your hardware at runtime — WebGPU, WebNN, DirectML, CPU cores, VRAM tier, and battery — and routes local inference to the fastest available backend. Enable it under Ρυθμίσεις → Early Access Features and inspect the live readout under Ρυθμίσεις → AI. Eco Mode picks the smallest viable model to save battery and memory, and a tab-leader election ensures only one browser tab uses the GPU at a time to avoid VRAM collisions.
help.advanced.adaptiveAi.title: Adaptive AI, GPU & Eco Mode
help.advanced.cloudSync.content: Optional end-to-end encrypted sync keeps your library in step across devices using a Cloudflare R2 backend. Enable “Cloud sync” under Ρυθμίσεις → Early Access Features and configure it under Ρυθμίσεις → Connections. Project data is encrypted locally with AES-256-GCM before upload, and your AI API keys are never sent to the cloud. Sync is entirely opt-in; with it off, StoryCraft remains a fully offline-first app.
help.advanced.cloudSync.title: Cloud Sync
help.advanced.encryption.content: Protect every manuscript, snapshot, and setting stored on your device with AES-256-GCM encryption derived from a passphrase (PBKDF2, 600,000 iterations). Enable it under Ρυθμίσεις → Privacy & Security → “Encrypt project data at rest”. On the next launch an unlock dialog asks for your passphrase; you can change or disable it later from the same panel. Your passphrase never leaves the device and cannot be recovered — export an encrypted library backup before you experiment.
help.advanced.encryption.title: Κρυπτογράφηση σε κατάσταση ηρεμίας
help.advanced.languages.content: StoryCraft Studio ships in seven interface languages — German, English, French, Spanish, Italian, plus Arabic and Hebrew as a right-to-left (RTL) Beta. Switch language in Ρυθμίσεις → General, the Καλώς ήρθατε Portal, or the Command Palette. Selecting Arabic or Hebrew flips the whole interface to RTL and loads self-hosted Noto Sans Arabic/Hebrew fonts (with Noto Naskh Arabic for the manuscript editor) for crisp glyphs. Your manuscript text always follows its own script direction, so you can mix Latin and RTL passages freely. RTL translations are a community-improvable Beta; help articles currently stay in English.
help.advanced.languages.title: Γλώσσες & Δεξιά προς Αριστερά (RTL)
help.advanced.lora.content: LoRA adapters let a local model learn your personal writing voice without sending a single word to the cloud. Enable “LoRA adapter inference” under Ρυθμίσεις → Early Access Features, then open Ρυθμίσεις → AI → Fine-Tuning to load a pre-trained .safetensors adapter for a compatible WebLLM or Ollama base model. The dedicated LoRA view walks you through dataset extraction, training presets (Writer Style Light → Full Style Clone), and a side-by-side style evaluation. Training runs entirely on your device via a Python sidecar; the adapter influence is tunable with the scale (α) control.
help.advanced.lora.title: LoRA Style Fine-Tuning
help.advanced.plugins.content: Extend the editor with sandboxed plugins that can only touch the capabilities they declare. Enable “Plugin system” under Ρυθμίσεις → Early Access Features, then manage installed plugins under Ρυθμίσεις → Plugins. Each plugin runs behind a permission-gated API with no direct access to the Redux store, network, or file system beyond what it requests. Reference plugins — a word-count overlay and a scene appender — show the descriptor format.
help.advanced.plugins.title: Πρόσθετα
help.advanced.proforge.content: ProForge is an eight-stage agentic editor that reads your whole manuscript and walks you from structural notes down to copy-edit and proofing. Enable it under Ρυθμίσεις → Early Access Features, then launch it from the AI tools panel in the Writer view. Every stage pauses for your review — the manuscript is never modified without explicit approval, and every change is reversible. A heuristic Supervisor flags low-confidence or fallback results so you can retry a stage with a sharper prompt.
help.advanced.proforge.title: ProForge Editing Pipeline
help.advanced.voice.content: Drive StoryCraft Studio hands-free: dictate prose, run commands, and hear AI responses read aloud. Turn on “Voice commands & dictation” under Ρυθμίσεις → Early Access Features, then configure activation (manual button, push-to-talk, or a wake word) under Ρυθμίσεις → Voice & Speech. The default engine uses your browser’s built-in speech with zero downloads; an optional offline Whisper.cpp WASM engine keeps audio fully on-device. All processing stays local unless you explicitly enable a cloud fallback.
help.advanced.voice.title: Φωνητικός Έλεγχος & Υπαγόρευση
help.ai.description: Δεν μπορείτε να βρείτε απάντηση; Κάντε μια ερώτηση στον βοηθό μας AI σχετικά με οποιοδήποτε χαρακτηριστικό.
help.ai.error: Λυπούμαστε, δεν μπόρεσα να επικοινωνήσω με τον βοηθό AI. Ελέγξτε τις ρυθμίσεις του παρόχου σας και δοκιμάστε ξανά.
help.ai.initialMessage: Γειά σου! Είμαι ο οδηγός σας AI για το StoryCraft Studio. Πώς μπορώ να σας βοηθήσω σήμερα; Μπορείτε να με ρωτήσετε οτιδήποτε ή να ξεκινήσετε με μία από τις παρακάτω προτάσεις.
help.ai.title: AI Βοήθεια Assistant
help.aiStudio.critic.content:
AI Critic

Το εργαλείο Critic διαβάζει ένα επιλεγμένο απόσπασμα χειρογράφου και επιστρέφει δομημένα σχόλια σε τρεις διαστάσεις: βηματοδότηση, σαφήνεια και τόνο. Δεν είναι γραμματικός έλεγχος — αξιολογεί την αφηγηματική τέχνη.

  • Τρόπος χρήσης: Στο AI Writing Studio, επιλέξτε την καρτέλα Κριτικός. Επισημάνετε μία ή περισσότερες παραγράφους χειρογράφου στο πρόγραμμα επεξεργασίας και, στη συνέχεια, κάντε κλικ στην επιλογή Ανάλυση. Το scratchpad εμφανίζει μια αναφορά αξιολόγησης με μία πρόταση με δυνατότητα δράσης ανά διάσταση.
  • Βηματισμός: Επισημαίνει τμήματα που αισθάνονται υπερβολικά βιαστικές (σύντομες προτάσεις, γρήγορες περικοπές σκηνής) ή πολύ αργές (μεγάλα μπλοκ έκθεσης με χαμηλή σύγκρουση).
  • Σαφήνεια: Επισημαίνει τις διφορούμενες αντωνυμίες με λανθασμένες ή μπερδεμένες αναφορές, περιβάλλων στυλ πεζογραφίας.
  • Τόνος: Ανιχνεύει μετατόπιση τόνου — π.χ. μια κωμωδία στην άκρη ενσωματωμένη σε μια σκηνή υψηλής έντασης — και υποδηλώνει εάν είναι σκόπιμη ή τυχαία.
  • RAG πλαίσιο: Όταν είναι ενεργοποιημένο το RAG context, ο κριτικός λαμβάνει πρόσθετα κομμάτια χειρογράφου, ώστε να μπορεί να συγκρίνει το επιλεγμένο απόσπασμα με την υπόλοιπη ιστορία σας, καταγράφοντας προβλήματα συνέπειας στην ανάλυση μεμονωμένων σημείων. miss.
  • Παροχέας: Χρησιμοποιεί τον ίδιο πάροχο, μοντέλο και ρύθμιση δημιουργικότητας με το Writer. Μεταβείτε σε ένα μοντέλο υψηλότερης ποιότητας για πιο διακριτικά σχόλια.
help.aiStudio.critic.title: AI Critic
help.aiStudio.localAi.content:
Local AI — WebLLM, ONNX, Transformers.js

Run AI models entirely in your browser — no API key, no internet, no data leaves your device. Enable under Ρυθμίσεις → AI → Local AI.

  • WebLLM (GPU): Uses WebGPU to run quantised LLMs (Llama 3.2, Phi-3.5 Mini, Gemma 2). Fast on modern GPUs; requires ~2–6 GB VRAM. Best choice for generation quality.
  • ONNX Runtime (CPU): WASM-based inference, no GPU required. Slower but works on any device. Good for short completions and classification.
  • Transformers.js: Powers the local embedding model used by the hybrid RAG index. Runs automatically; no manual configuration needed.
  • Download a model: Go to Ρυθμίσεις → Advanced AI → Local AI models, pick a model, and click Download. A progress bar tracks the download; large models (2–4 GB) may take several minutes on first load.
  • Switch to local: In the AI Writing Studio toolbar, change the provider to "WebLLM" or "ONNX" before generating. Inference then runs fully offline.
help.aiStudio.localAi.title: Τοπικό AI (WebLLM / ONNX)
help.aiStudio.overview.content:
Your Creative Co-Pilot

The AI Writing Studio is your dedicated space for AI-assisted writing. The workflow is designed for power and flexibility:

  1. Select Context: First, choose the manuscript section you want to work on from the dropdown menu in the 'Χειρόγραφο Context' panel.
  2. Choose a Tool: Select one of the powerful AI tools from the top of the 'AI Tools' panel.
  3. Provide Input: Depending on the tool, you might need to select text in the editor, choose characters, or write a prompt.
  4. Δημιουργία: Click the 'Δημιουργία' button. The output will appear in the 'AI Scratchpad' on the right.
  5. Review and Accept: You can edit the generated text in the scratchpad. Once you're happy, use the 'Insert' or 'Replace' buttons to apply it to your manuscript.
help.aiStudio.overview.title: Επισκόπηση του AI Writing Studio
help.aiStudio.plotAi.content:
Πίνακας Πλοκής AI: Suggest Επόμενο Beat

The Suggest next beat feature uses your manuscript and outline as context to propose the next scene card for the Πίνακας Πλοκής. It is designed for moments when you know a chapter needs "something" but are unsure what.

  • Trigger: Open the Πίνακας Πλοκής (enable Πίνακας Πλοκής v2 in feature flags first). Click the AI ✦ button in the Πίνακας Πλοκής toolbar to open the suggestion panel.
  • How it works: StoryCraft assembles a RAG-enriched prompt from your recent manuscript sections, existing beat cards, and your project outline. This context is sent to your configured AI provider.
  • Output: The AI returns a suggested beat title, a short description, and a recommended act placement. A preview card appears in the panel with Accept and Reject buttons.
  • Accept: Clicking Accept creates the beat card on the board in the suggested act column. You can drag it to reposition or edit the title inline.
  • Multiple suggestions: Click Suggest again to get an alternative without accepting the first. Both suggestions appear side-by-side for comparison.
  • Best results: Works best when your manuscript has at least 500 words and existing beat cards have descriptive titles. Enable RAG context in Ρυθμίσεις → Advanced AI for richer retrieval.
help.aiStudio.plotAi.title: Πίνακας Πλοκής AI beats
help.aiStudio.providers.content:
AI Providers & API Keys

StoryCraft Studio connects to eight AI backends. Configure them under Ρυθμίσεις → AI Models and Ρυθμίσεις → Advanced AI. All API keys are encrypted with AES-256-GCM (PBKDF2 600 000 iterations, SHA-256) before being stored in IndexedDB — they are never transmitted to any StoryCraft server.

Cloud Providers

  • Google Gemini (default): Fast, generous free tier. Get a free API key from Google AI Studio. Recommended models: gemini-2.5-flash for everyday use, gemini-2.5-pro for complex generation tasks.
  • OpenAI: GPT-4o and GPT-4o-mini. Enter your OpenAI API key in Ρυθμίσεις → AI → OpenAI key. Strong at instruction-following and prose rewriting.
  • Anthropic (Claude): Claude 3.5 Sonnet and Claude 3 Haiku. Enter your API key from console.anthropic.com. Excellent for long-form narrative and nuanced tone.
  • Grok (xAI): Grok-2 via xAI API. Enter your key from the xAI developer portal. Competitive on creative tasks with a lower cost per token than GPT-4.

Local / Self-Hosted Providers

  • Ollama (local — desktop only): Runs models on your machine via http://localhost:11434. Install Ollama and run ollama pull llama3.2 to get started. The Tauri desktop app bypasses the browser's CSP restriction on localhost connections. Supports any Ollama-compatible model including fine-tuned LoRA adapters.
  • WebLLM (browser, GPU): Runs quantized LLMs in the browser via WebGPU — no API key, no internet required after first download. Supported models: Llama 3.2 1B/3B, Phi-3.5 Mini, Gemma 2 2B. Requires a WebGPU-capable GPU (~2–6 GB VRAM). Download a model under Ρυθμίσεις → Advanced AI → Local AI models.
  • ONNX Runtime Web (browser, CPU): WASM-based inference without a GPU. Slower than WebLLM but works on any device. Good for short completions and classification tasks.
  • Transformers.js (automatic): Powers the local embedding model used by the hybrid RAG index (MiniLM-L6-v2, 384 dimensions). Runs automatically — no configuration needed.

Hybrid Fallback Chain

Under Ρυθμίσεις → Advanced AI → Hybrid fallback chain, define an ordered list of providers. If the primary provider returns a rate-limit or network error, StoryCraft automatically retries with the next provider in the chain. This creates a resilient setup — for example: try Gemini first, fall back to OpenAI, fall back to Ollama on desktop.

Creativity Setting

The Creativity slider (0–1) maps to the AI temperature parameter. Use 0.2–0.4 for factual tasks (summaries, consistency checks), 0.5–0.7 for balanced prose continuation, and 0.8–1.0 for brainstorming and highly creative generation.
help.aiStudio.providers.title: Πάροχοι & κλειδιά τεχνητής νοημοσύνης
help.aiStudio.ragContext.content:
Retrieval-augmented prompts (local)

When RAG context is enabled in the AI Tools panel, StoryCraft retrieves relevant manuscript chunks before calling the model. Hybrid mode blends semantic embeddings (~60%), lexical overlap (~30%), and recency (~10%).

  1. Build the index under Ρυθμίσεις → Advanced AI → Rebuild local search index (requires the local embedding model on capable devices).
  2. Open the AI Writing Studio, enable RAG context, and run Συνέχεια, Brainstorm, or Critic.
  3. The chunk badge shows how many passages were injected; Πίνακας Πλοκής beat suggestions use the same pipeline.

Your manuscript text stays in the browser; only the assembled prompt is sent to your chosen AI provider.
help.aiStudio.ragContext.title: RAG πλαίσιο για τη δημιουργία AI
help.aiStudio.tools.content:
The Right Tool for the Job

Each tool in the studio serves a different purpose:

  • Συνέχεια Writing: Perfect for writer's block. Place your cursor in the text, and the AI will write what comes next.
  • Improve Text: Highlight a sentence or paragraph, and the AI will rewrite it. Use the Style dropdown to guide the improvement (e.g., make it more 'Cinematic').
  • Change Tone: Similar to 'Improve Text,' but uses the Tone dropdown to change the mood (e.g., make it more 'Suspenseful').
  • Δημιουργία Dialogue: Select the characters in the scene, describe the scenario, and the AI will write their conversation.
  • Brainstorm Ideas: Get a list of creative plot points for what could happen next.
  • Summarize Section: Quickly generates a synopsis of the selected manuscript section, which is useful for checking pacing or writing chapter summaries.
help.aiStudio.tools.title: Κατανόηση των εργαλείων AI
help.analysis.consistency.content:
Consistency Checker

The Consistency Checker scans your manuscript and compares every character and world mention against their dossier details. It catches continuity errors automatically — like a character being described as left-handed in Chapter 1 but right-handed in Chapter 12, or a location appearing after it was destroyed on the timeline.

  • How to run: Navigate to Consistency Checker from the sidebar. Click Run full scan. The scan reads all manuscript sections and cross-references characters, worlds, and the scene timeline.
  • Warning types: Name mismatch (alias used inconsistently), Attribute conflict (a physical or personality trait contradicts the dossier), Timeline violation (a scene references an event before it occurs), Dead character mention (a character marked deceased appears alive in dialogue).
  • Reading a warning: Each warning shows the section title, the offending sentence, and a suggested fix. Click Jump to section to open the Χειρόγραφο editor at that exact location.
  • Ignoring warnings: Click Dismiss on a warning to suppress it if the inconsistency is intentional (e.g. an unreliable narrator). Dismissed warnings are hidden until you click Show dismissed.
  • Re-scan after edits: The checker does not update in real time. After fixing an issue, click Run full scan again to clear the resolved warning from the list.
help.analysis.consistency.title: Έλεγχος συνέπειας
help.analysis.crossProject.content:
Cross-Project Αναζήτηση

Find manuscript text, character names, and world details across every project stored in your browser — ideal for series writing or reusing world-building. Enable under Ρυθμίσεις → Experimental flags → Cross-project search.

  • What is indexed: Χειρόγραφο section titles and content, character names and descriptions, world names. Images and encrypted keys are never indexed.
  • Index updates: The index rebuilds automatically on each save (debounced). A subtle background indicator appears in the status bar during indexing.
  • Privacy: The index lives entirely in your browser's IndexedDB. Nothing is sent to any server; all search runs locally.
  • How to search: Open the Command Palette (Ctrl+K) and type your query, or open the Cross-Project Αναζήτηση panel from the sidebar. Results show project title, section, and a short excerpt. Click a result to open that project at the matching section.
  • Reset the index: Ρυθμίσεις → Data → Rebuild cross-project index if results seem stale after importing a backup.
help.analysis.crossProject.title: Αναζήτηση μεταξύ έργων
help.analysis.health.content:
Project Health Score

A blended indicator (0–100) that gives you a quick read on how well-developed your project is. Enable under Ρυθμίσεις → Experimental flags → Project health score.

  • Goal completeness (25%): Whether a word-count goal and target date are set, and how much progress you have made toward them.
  • Cast depth (25%): Average number of filled fields per character profile. Characters with only a name pull the score down; fully described cast members lift it.
  • Κόσμος-building coverage (25%): Ratio of world and location records with descriptions and at least one linked manuscript section.
  • Χειρόγραφο consistency (25%): Inverse of open Consistency Checker warnings — fewer warnings, higher sub-score.
  • How to improve: Expand character backstories, add world details, set a goal and target date, and resolve Consistency warnings. Each action moves the dial.
  • Location: The score ring appears on the Πίνακας Ελέγχου when the flag is active. Hover to see the four sub-scores individually.
help.analysis.health.title: Βαθμολογία υγείας του έργου
help.analysis.progress.content:
Progress Tracker

The Progress Tracker view keeps you on course with session tracking, streaks, and historical charts.

  • Session timer: Press Ctrl+Shift+S (or the play button in the progress card) to start a writing session. Stop it to record your word-count delta and session length.
  • Daily & weekly goals: Set targets under Ρυθμίσεις → Writing Goals. The Πίνακας Ελέγχου ring shows today's progress at a glance.
  • Streak: Consecutive-day writing count at the top of the Progress view. Write at least one word on any day to keep the streak alive. Days follow your local timezone.
  • Velocity chart: 30-day rolling bar chart — words written per day. Hover a bar to see the exact count and which session contributed most.
  • 12-week heatmap: A GitHub-style contribution grid for the last 84 days. Darker cells indicate higher-output days.
  • Εξαγωγή history: Click Εξαγωγή CSV in the Progress view to download your full writing history for spreadsheet analysis.
help.analysis.progress.title: Πρόοδος & αναγνωσιμότητα
help.article.selectPrompt: Επιλέξτε ένα άρθρο στα αριστερά για να το διαβάσετε ή ζητήστε βοήθεια από τον βοηθό μας AI.
help.description: Βρείτε απαντήσεις, μάθετε πώς να κυριαρχείτε στο StoryCraft Studio ή ζητήστε βοήθεια από τον βοηθό μας AI.
help.docs.architecture.content:
Αρχιτεκτονική εφαρμογών

Το StoryCraft Studio είναι μια πρώτη προοδευτική εφαρμογή Ιστού εκτός σύνδεσης — ένα React 19 SPA με ενσωμάτωση Google Gemini AI, εμμονή IndexedDB και ένα προαιρετικό κέλυφος επιφάνειας εργασίας Tauri v2. Δεν υπάρχει διακομιστής υποστήριξης. Τα κλειδιά API εισάγονται στη διεπαφή χρήστη και κρυπτογραφούνται σε κατάσταση ηρεμίας.

Frontend Stack

  • React 19 με ταυτόχρονη απόδοση και React.lazy() και για τις 14 προβολές.
  • TypeScript — σε αυστηρή λειτουργία — exactOptionalPropertyTypes, noUncheckedIndexedAccess, noImplicitReturns.
  • Vite 8 για διακομιστή ανάπτυξης (HMR) και εκδόσεις παραγωγής με χειροκίνητο διαχωρισμό κώδικα --sc-* μεταβλητές CSS) για σχεδίαση με θέμα.
  • Redux Toolkit 2.x για καθολική κατάσταση — σε φέτες, με redux-undo αναδίπλωση του τμήματος έργου (100->). (ανοιχτή παλέτα εντολών, αναζήτηση μεταξύ έργων, Λειτουργία ροής) που δεν χρειάζεται επιβάρυνση Redux.

Επίπεδο υπηρεσίας

  • Υπηρεσίες AI: Vercel AI SDK ως το κύριο επίπεδο ροής. geminiService.ts για παλαιού τύπου thunks. Η αφαίρεση πολλών παρόχων στο aiProviderService.ts υποστηρίζει Gemini, OpenAI, Anthropic, Grok, Ollama, WebLLM, ONNX και Transformers.js.
  • Αποθήκευση: Αποσυντεθειμένο επίπεδο IDB κάτω από services/storage —, ξεχωριστές μονάδες για έργα/ κλειδιά, Κώδικας, στοιχεία και κρυπτογράφηση.
  • Συνεργασία: Yjs CRDT + packages/collab-transport (πακέτα προμηθευτή του y-webrtc με κρυπτογράφηση E2E RTCDataChannel).
  • WAFSworkerD:Analytics. ερωτήματα? το RAG vector store (ενσωματώσεις float 384-dim) ζει επίσης εκεί.

Στρατηγική διαχωρισμού κώδικα

Η δέσμη εισόδου παραμένει λιτή. Vite χειροκίνητα κομμάτια ξεχωριστά: vendor-react, vendor-redux, plot-board (canvas/SVG), export-docx (docx/jsPDF/jszip), colab-ys. Τα κομμάτια DuckDB, ONNX και WebLLM εξαιρούνται από την προκαταρκτική μνήμη του Service Worker για να αποφευχθεί η εκ των προτέρων προσωρινή αποθήκευση μεγάλων λειτουργικών μονάδων WASM.

Tauri Desktop Shell

Ένα προαιρετικό περιτύλιγμα Rust/Tauri v2 προσθέτει εγγενή πρόσβαση στο σύστημα αρχείων, το Ollama σε μενού εγγενών κεντρικών υπολογιστών, ένα ενσωματωμένο μενού σε έναν τοπικό κεντρικό υπολογιστή και ένα ενσωματωμένο παράθυρο αυτόματη ενημέρωση. Η εφαρμογή Ιστού και η εφαρμογή για υπολογιστές μοιράζονται την ίδια βάση κώδικα React. Η ανίχνευση χρόνου εκτέλεσης (isTauriRuntime()) θέτει τις πύλες σε διαδρομές ειδικά για το Tauri.
help.docs.architecture.title: Αρχιτεκτονική εφαρμογών
help.docs.dataModel.content:
Project Data Model

All project data lives in a single StoryProject object in the Redux store, persisted to IndexedDB (or the Tauri app data directory) via storageService. The project slice is wrapped with redux-undo, giving you 100 steps of undo/redo history in memory.

Top-Level Fields

  • id, title, description: Project identity. The ID is a UUID generated on creation and never changes.
  • manuscript: Array of StorySection objects — each with an id, title, content (plain text), order, type (chapter / part / epilogue), and optional notes.
  • characters: Array of Χαρακτήρας objects — name, aliases, backstory, personality, appearance, goals, flaws, relationships, AI-generated portrait URL.
  • worlds: Array of WorldBuilding objects — name, description, geography, culture, magic/technology system, timeline events, locations, atmosphere image URL.
  • objects: Props, factions, and groups with scene and character links (behind enableObjectsGroups flag).
  • plotConnections, plotSubplots: Edges and subplot tracks for the Πίνακας Πλοκής canvas.
  • tensionOverrides: Manual tension-curve adjustments per section.
  • outline: AI-generated outline sections (title, description, order) — the source of truth for the Σχεδιάγραμμα Generator view.
  • projectGoals: Target word count and target date.
  • writingHistory: Array of WritingSession records (date, words written, duration) powering the Progress Tracker charts.

Persistence

On every save (debounced 2 s after the last change), the project slice is compressed with LZ-String and written to the app-data IDB object store under the key 'project'. Ρυθμίσεις are written separately under 'settings'. When enableIdbAtRestEncryption is on, each value is AES-256-GCM encrypted before storage.

Snapshot Format

Snapshots capture a deep clone of the project at a point in time. Auto-snapshots (up to 20, pruned FIFO) and manual snapshots (kept indefinitely) are stored in a separate scene-revisions IDB store. Each snapshot record has an id, label, createdAt, and the full project JSON as a compressed blob.
help.docs.dataModel.title: Μοντέλο δεδομένων έργου
help.docs.deployment.content:
Επιλογές ανάπτυξης

Το StoryCraft Studio είναι μια στατική εφαρμογή Ιστού — κάθε κεντρικός υπολογιστής που μπορεί να εξυπηρετήσει αρχεία HTML/CSS/JS θα λειτουργήσει. Η έκδοση παραγωγής δημιουργείται από το vite build και τοποθετείται στο dist/.

  • Vercel (κύριο): Η κανονική ζωντανή ανάπτυξη. Διαμορφώθηκε μέσω vercel.json. κάθε πάτημα στο main ενεργοποιεί μια αυτόματη ανάπτυξη. Η έκδοση συμβατή με άκρα διατίθεται μέσω του pnpm run build:edge.
  • Σελίδες Cloudflare: Χρησιμοποιεί το σενάριο build:pages και διαμορφώνεται στο wrangler.toml. Εξυπηρετεί από το παγκόσμιο δίκτυο αιχμής της Cloudflare. Κατάλληλο για χρήστες σε περιοχές όπου ο λανθάνοντας χρόνος Vercel είναι υψηλότερος.
  • Σελίδες GitHub: Δευτερεύων στατικός κεντρικός υπολογιστής. αυτόματη ανάπτυξη από τον κλάδο gh-pages μέσω της εργασίας ανάπτυξης CI. Διατίθεται ως εναλλακτική λύση.
  • Αυτοφιλοξενούμενη: Εκτελέστε το pnpm run build, αντιγράψτε το dist/ σε οποιονδήποτε διακομιστή στατικών αρχείων (Nginx, Caddy, S3 + CloudFront). Δεν απαιτείται λογική από την πλευρά του διακομιστή — όλα εκτελούνται στο πρόγραμμα περιήγησης.
  • Εκδόσεις Tauri για επιτραπέζιους υπολογιστές: Δημιουργήθηκε από τη ροή εργασίας Tauri CI σε εκδόσεις με ετικέτα. Η υπογραφή κωδικού είναι από την πλευρά του συντηρητή. Οι έλεγχοι ενημέρωσης χρησιμοποιούν την προσθήκη ενημέρωσης Tauri που οδηγεί στο τελικό σημείο JSON εκδόσεων GitHub.
  • Μεταβλητές περιβάλλοντος: Μόνο μεταβλητές με πρόθεμα VITE_* ενσωματώνονται κατά το χρόνο δημιουργίας. Δεν ψήνονται μυστικά κλειδιά στο δυαδικό σύστημα — οι χρήστες εισάγουν τα δικά τους κλειδιά API στη διεπαφή χρήστη.
help.docs.deployment.title: Επιλογές ανάπτυξης
help.docs.duckdb.content:
DuckDB-WASM Analytics

When the DuckDB analytics feature flag is on, StoryCraft spins up a DuckDB-WASM worker that stores rich analytics data in the browser's OPFS — a persistent, sandboxed storage not cleared by normal browser cache clears.

  • What it enables: Advanced writing analytics dashboards — velocity trends beyond the 30-day chart, character mention frequency, world reference heatmaps, and the RAG vector store (384-dim float embeddings) for faster retrieval.
  • Why WASM: DuckDB runs entirely in the browser as a WebAssembly module; no data is sent to a server. Queries run at native SQL speed directly on your local data.
  • Performance note: The DuckDB worker adds ~6 MB to initial load and uses ~50–150 MB of WASM heap depending on manuscript size. On devices with less than 4 GB RAM, prefer leaving this flag off.
  • Dual-write: When active, every save writes to both IndexedDB (fast, reliable) and DuckDB (for analytics queries). The write is asynchronous and does not block the editor.
  • Lazy loading: The DuckDB listener is dynamically imported — it does not load until the flag is on and the app restarts. Cold-start performance is unaffected when the flag is off.
  • Reset: If analytics data becomes stale, go to Ρυθμίσεις → Data → Reset DuckDB store to drop and recreate the DuckDB tables. Your manuscript data in IndexedDB is unaffected.
help.docs.duckdb.title: Αναλυτικά στοιχεία DuckDB-WASM
help.docs.featureFlags.content:
Feature Flag System

StoryCraft Studio gates experimental or resource-intensive features behind twelve boolean flags in featureFlagsSlice. Flags are persisted to localStorage under the key storycraft-feature-flags and survive app restarts.

  • Where to toggle: Ρυθμίσεις → Experimental flags. Each flag has a title, a one-line description, and a resource hint (memory / CPU) when relevant.
  • Effect on the app: Flags gate sidebar navigation entries, Redux listeners (e.g. the DuckDB dual-write listener), and lazy-loaded bundles. Disabling a flag hides the UI and pauses the listener but does not delete its data.
  • Current flags: Codex auto-tracking, Story Bible advanced, Research binder, Compile wizard, Project health score, Cross-project search, App health panel, Πίνακας Πλοκής v2, DuckDB analytics, Objects & groups, Mind maps, Χαρακτήρας interviews.
  • Safe enable order: Start with lower-memory flags (Codex, Cross-project search) before enabling WASM-heavy ones (Πίνακας Πλοκής v2, DuckDB analytics). Always create a snapshot first in case a WASM flag triggers an out-of-memory restart on low-end hardware.
  • Resetting flags: If the app becomes unstable, go to Ρυθμίσεις → Data → Reset feature flags to restore all flags to their off defaults without touching project data.
help.docs.featureFlags.title: Σύστημα σημαίας χαρακτηριστικών
help.docs.lazyLoading.content:
Lazy Φόρτωση & Bundle Architecture

StoryCraft Studio is engineered for a fast initial load. All 14 major views and several heavy libraries are loaded on-demand, only when first needed.

  • Views: Every view is wrapped in React.lazy() with a Suspense boundary. The view bundle downloads the first time you navigate to it; subsequent visits use the browser cache.
  • Vite manual chunks: The build splits vendor code into named chunks: vendor-react, vendor-redux, plot-board (canvas + SVG), export-docx (docx/jsPDF/jszip), collab-yjs (Yjs + y-webrtc). These download only when you first open their respective view.
  • AI provider layer: services/ai/index.ts is dynamically imported the first time an AI tool is used. The Vercel AI SDK and provider adapters (~200 KB gzipped) are not bundled in the entry chunk.
  • DuckDB & RAG: The DuckDB listener and local embedding model are loaded by the Redux listener middleware only when their feature flags are on. They do not contribute to cold-start bundle size.
  • Force graph: react-force-graph-2d is lazy-imported only when you navigate to the Χαρακτήρας Graph and have at least one character — the empty-state view loads without triggering the import.
  • Bundle budget: The CI bundle:budget job enforces a maximum of 7 000 KB for the vendor chunk and 4 500 KB for the entry chunk. PRs that exceed these limits fail the build.
help.docs.lazyLoading.title: Τεμπέλης φόρτωση & πακέτα
help.docs.privacySecurity.content:
Μοντέλο απορρήτου και ασφάλειας

Το StoryCraft Studio έχει σχεδιαστεί πρώτα τοπικά: η ιστορία σας δεν φεύγει ποτέ από τη συσκευή σας, εκτός εάν στείλετε ρητά ένα μήνυμα προτροπής σε έναν πάροχο τεχνητής νοημοσύνης στο cloud.

  • Δεν απαιτείται λογαριασμός: Δεν υπάρχει εγγραφή, δεν υπάρχει συγχρονισμός στο cloud και δεν υπάρχει διακομιστής που αποθηκεύει τα χειρόγραφά σας. Όλα τα δεδομένα ζουν στο IndexedDB και στο OPFS του προγράμματος περιήγησής σας.
  • Κρυπτογράφηση κλειδιού API: Όταν εισάγετε ένα κλειδί API, κρυπτογραφείται με AES-256-GCM (κλειδί 256-bit, τυχαία 12-byte IV, PBKDF20-50-5 με S6001) IndexedDB. Το κλειδί απλού κειμένου δεν γράφεται ποτέ στο δίσκο ή στο localStorage.
  • Αιτήματα AI: Μόνο το κείμενο που υποβάλλετε ρητά (π.χ. ένα επιλεγμένο απόσπασμα για "Βελτίωση κειμένου") αποστέλλεται στον πάροχο της επιλογής σας. Ο αγωγός RAG λειτουργεί τοπικά. μόνο η τελική συναρμολογημένη προτροπή ταξιδεύει μέσω του δικτύου.
  • Πολιτική ασφάλειας περιεχομένου: Η έκδοση ιστού περιλαμβάνει ένα αυστηρό CSP που αποκλείει τα ενσωματωμένα σενάρια, τα αυθαίρετα αιτήματα δικτύου και τις συνδέσεις τοπικού κεντρικού υπολογιστή (αποτρέποντας μια παραβιασμένη επέκταση από την πρόσβαση στο Ollama μέσω της σελίδας).
  • Ο κατάλογος δεδομένων plugs της εφαρμογής Tauri για τον υπολογιστή Shell: Η αυθαίρετη πρόσβαση στο σύστημα αρχείων είναι αποκλεισμένη. η προσθήκη dialog απαιτεί επιβεβαίωση από τον χρήστη για κάθε λειτουργία ανοίγματος/αποθήκευσης.
  • Συνεργασία: Όταν είναι ενεργοποιημένη η Συνεργασία, οι ενημερώσεις Yjs κρυπτογραφούνται από άκρο σε άκρο (AES-256-GCM + PBKDF2) πριν φύγουν από το πρόγραμμα περιήγησης. Ο διακομιστής σηματοδότησης δεν βλέπει ποτέ περιεχόμενο εγγράφου απλού κειμένου.
  • Έλεγχοι εξαρτήσεων: Η σάρωση OSV + CodeQL εκτελείται σε κάθε ώθηση CI. Το Dependabot παρακολουθεί για νέα CVE. Οι πινέζες παράκαμψης στο pnpm.overrides χρησιμοποιούνται όταν μια επιδιορθωμένη έκδοση δεν είναι ακόμη διαθέσιμη στο upstream.
help.docs.privacySecurity.title: Μοντέλο απορρήτου και ασφάλειας
help.docs.pwaDesktop.content:
PWA & Desktop Packaging

StoryCraft Studio ships as both a Progressive Web App (PWA) and a native desktop app (Tauri). Both options keep your data local — no account required.

PWA (browser)

  • Install: Visit the web app in Chrome, Edge, or Safari and click the "Install" prompt in the address bar. The app icon appears on your desktop or home screen.
  • Offline shell cache: The Service Worker pre-caches the app shell (HTML, CSS, JS entry chunks) so the interface loads instantly, even offline. Only cloud AI requests need a network connection.
  • Storage: Data lives in IndexedDB and OPFS — persistent, sandboxed, and not cleared by normal browser cache clears.
  • Icons: The PWA manifest includes 192×192 and 512×512 maskable PNG icons used by Android and Windows for the installed app shortcut.

Tauri desktop app

  • What it adds: Native filesystem access, Ollama on localhost, window-state persistence (size, position), a File/Βοήθεια menu bar, and an optional auto-updater banner under Ρυθμίσεις → About.
  • Rust plugins bundled: fs, dialog, http, shell, updater, plus optional menu, tray, and window-state.
  • Data folder: On the desktop app, Ρυθμίσεις → Data → Open data folder reveals the OS path where all IndexedDB and OPFS data is stored — safe to back up manually.
  • Installers: Built by the Tauri CI workflow on tagged releases. Available for macOS (.dmg), Windows (.msi), and Linux (.AppImage / .deb).
help.docs.pwaDesktop.title: Συσκευασία PWA & επιτραπέζιου υπολογιστή
help.docs.ragPipeline.content:
RAG & Prompt Assembly

StoryCraft's retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) pipeline enriches every AI request with relevant passages from your own manuscript — so the model knows your story before it writes the next line.

  • Building the index: Go to Ρυθμίσεις → Advanced AI → Rebuild local search index. StoryCraft splits your manuscript into overlapping ~200-token chunks and encodes each with MiniLM-L6-v2 (384-dimensional embeddings) running locally via Transformers.js.
  • Hybrid retrieval: When a request is made, the pipeline scores candidate chunks three ways — semantic cosine similarity (~60%), lexical keyword overlap (~30%), and recency (favoring later chapters, ~10%) — then selects the top-K passages.
  • Prompt assembly: assembleRAGPrompt() builds a token-budgeted context block from the selected chunks and prepends it to the AI prompt. The chunk badge in the Writer panel shows how many passages were injected.
  • Where RAG is used: Συνέχεια Writing, Brainstorm, AI Critic, and Πίνακας Πλοκής "Suggest next beat" all use the same pipeline when RAG is enabled.
  • Rebuild triggers: Rebuild the index after importing a backup, adding many new characters, or when AI completions seem unfamiliar with your story's details.
  • Privacy: The index lives entirely in your browser's OPFS. Χειρόγραφο text is never uploaded to build the index — only the final assembled prompt travels to your chosen cloud provider.
help.docs.ragPipeline.title: RAG & άμεση συναρμολόγηση
help.docs.tauriDesktop.content:
Tauri Desktop App

The StoryCraft Studio desktop app wraps the same React codebase in a native Tauri v2 shell (Rust). It adds capabilities that browsers cannot provide while keeping your data fully local.

What the Desktop App Adds

  • Native filesystem access: Read and write files directly via the Tauri fs plugin — no browser file picker required for every operation. Logs are written to $APPDATA/logs/storycraft-YYYY-MM-DD.jsonl.
  • Ollama on localhost: Cloud AI providers block localhost connections in the browser (CSP); the desktop app bypasses this restriction, letting Ollama serve models at localhost:11434 without a proxy.
  • Window-state persistence: Window size, position, and maximized state are restored exactly on each launch via the Tauri window-state plugin.
  • Native menu bar: A File / Επεξεργασία / View / Βοήθεια menu bar following OS conventions (macOS: menu in toolbar; Windows/Linux: embedded in the window).
  • Auto-updater: The Tauri updater plugin checks the GitHub releases JSON endpoint on startup and shows a banner under Ρυθμίσεις → About when a new version is available. Click Install update to download and apply it in the background.
  • Open data folder: Ρυθμίσεις → Data → Open data folder opens the OS file explorer at the directory where IndexedDB and OPFS data are stored — useful for manual backups.
  • Stronghold (optional): The tauri-plugin-stronghold can store the IDB encryption passphrase in the OS keychain so the unlock modal never appears on desktop.

Installers & Distribution

The Tauri CI workflow builds platform-specific installers on every tagged release (v*): .dmg for macOS (code-signed), .msi / .exe for Windows (code-signed), .AppImage and .deb for Linux. Installers are attached to GitHub Releases and referenced by the auto-updater endpoint.

Data Location

On desktop, data lives in the Tauri app data directory — typically %APPDATA%\StoryCraft Studio on Windows, ~/Library/Application Support/StoryCraft Studio on macOS, and ~/.local/share/storycraft-studio on Linux. You can safely copy this directory for a full manual backup.
help.docs.tauriDesktop.title: Εφαρμογή επιφάνειας εργασίας Tauri
help.faq.api.content:
Yes. To use any of the AI-powered features (like generation, improvement, or brainstorming), the application requires a Google Gemini API key. You can obtain a free key from Google AI Studio.

Go to Ρυθμίσεις → AI Configuration and enter your key. It will be encrypted using AES-256-GCM and stored securely in your browser's IndexedDB. Your key never leaves your device and is never transmitted to any server.
help.faq.api.title: Χρειάζομαι κλειδί API;
help.faq.offline.content:
Working Offline

StoryCraft Studio is local-first. Almost everything works without an internet connection once the app is loaded.

  • Always available offline: Writing, the Πίνακας Πλοκής, character and world editing, snapshot creation and restore, Εξαγωγή to PDF / Markdown / TXT, all Ρυθμίσεις.
  • Needs network: Cloud AI providers (Gemini, OpenAI, Anthropic, Grok) send your prompt over the internet. Writing is never blocked — only AI features return an error when offline.
  • Pre-download local models: Go to Ρυθμίσεις → Advanced AI → Local AI models and download a WebLLM or ONNX model while online. Once cached, inference runs fully offline.
  • PWA shell cache: Install StoryCraft as a PWA (browser "Install" prompt) to cache the app shell via the Service Worker. Subsequent loads work offline even without internet.
  • OPFS storage: DuckDB analytics and the local embedding model use the browser Origin Private File System (OPFS) — a persistent, sandboxed area not cleared by normal cache-clearing actions.
help.faq.offline.title: Μπορώ να εργαστώ εκτός σύνδεσης;
help.faq.privacy.content: Απολύτως. Το απόρρητό σας είναι πρωταρχικής σημασίας. Επειδή όλα τα δεδομένα αποθηκεύονται τοπικά στο πρόγραμμα περιήγησής σας, δεν έχουμε ποτέ πρόσβαση στην εργασία σας. Η ιστορία σας παραμένει εντελώς ιδιωτική και υπό τον έλεγχό σας. Όταν χρησιμοποιείτε λειτουργίες AI, μόνο το συγκεκριμένο κείμενο που απαιτείται για αυτό το αίτημα αποστέλλεται στο Google Gemini API και δεν χρησιμοποιείται για την εκπαίδευση των μοντέλων τους.
help.faq.privacy.title: Είναι ιδιωτική η ιστορία μου;
help.faq.providers.content:
Which AI Provider Should I Use?

StoryCraft supports multiple AI providers. Here is a quick guide to help you choose.

  • Google Gemini (cloud): The default. Gemini Flash is fast and free-tier friendly; Gemini Pro gives higher quality. Requires a free API key from Google AI Studio. Best for: everyday writing assistance.
  • OpenAI (cloud): GPT-4o and GPT-4o-mini via API key. Strong instruction-following and prose rewriting. Best for: users already on the OpenAI ecosystem.
  • Ollama (local — desktop only): Runs models on your machine via localhost:11434. Requires the Tauri desktop app. Best for: maximum privacy and zero API cost with any Ollama-supported model.
  • WebLLM (local — browser): GPU inference directly in the browser; no server, no API key. Models are downloaded once and cached. Best for: privacy without the desktop app, fully offline after first download.
  • Hybrid fallback: Enable under Ρυθμίσεις → Advanced AI to chain providers automatically — e.g., try Gemini first, fall back to Ollama on error. Useful for resilient workflows.
help.faq.providers.title: Ποιον πάροχο τεχνητής νοημοσύνης πρέπει να χρησιμοποιήσω;
help.faq.saving.content:
Your entire project, including all text and AI-generated images, is saved automatically and continuously in your web browser's local storage (a database called IndexedDB). This means your work is persisted on your computer between sessions. A 'Saving...' indicator appears in the header when changes are being written, followed by 'All changes saved'.

There is no cloud account or server-side storage. This ensures complete privacy but also means you are responsible for creating backups using the 'Εξαγωγή Backup' feature in Ρυθμίσεις.
help.faq.saving.title: Πώς αποθηκεύονται τα δεδομένα του έργου μου;
help.gettingStarted.desktop.content:
Where you run StoryCraft

Browser / PWA: Install from the browser for offline cache; data stays in IndexedDB.

Desktop (Tauri): Native FS access, Ollama to localhost, optional auto-updater, window state restore, and “open data folder” in Ρυθμίσεις → Data.

API keys and manuscripts never leave your device unless you send text to a cloud AI provider.
help.gettingStarted.desktop.title: Εφαρμογή για υπολογιστές (Tauri) & PWA
help.gettingStarted.firstProject.content:
Choose Your Path

The Καλώς ήρθατε Portal gives you three powerful ways to begin:

  1. Start with a Template: This is great for structured storytelling. Go to the Templates view, choose a structure like the 'Three-Act Structure,' and use the 'Personalize with AI' feature to get custom prompts for each section based on your story idea.
  2. Δημιουργία with AI: If you have a concept but no structure, use the Σχεδιάγραμμα Generator. Just provide your genre and a story idea, and it will create a full, editable plot outline that you can apply to your manuscript.
  3. Start Blank: For those who prefer a completely open canvas, this option creates a new project with an empty first chapter, ready for you to start writing immediately.
help.gettingStarted.firstProject.title: Ξεκινώντας το πρώτο σας έργο
help.gettingStarted.navigation.content:
Every major view

  • Πίνακας Ελέγχου — goals, stats, backup quick actions, onboarding tour.
  • Χειρόγραφο — three-panel editor with @mentions and #world tags.
  • AI Writing Studio — continue, improve, dialogue, RAG context.
  • Πίνακας Σκηνών / Πίνακας Πλοκής — canvas, swimlanes, tension curve, AI beat suggestions.
  • Characters, Worlds, Objects, Mind Maps, Interviews — worldbuilding suite (some behind feature flags).
  • Χαρακτήρας Graph, Consistency Checker, Critic — analysis tools.
  • Εξαγωγή, Ρυθμίσεις, Βοήθεια — publishing, configuration, learning center.
help.gettingStarted.navigation.title: Επισκόπηση πλαϊνής γραμμής και προβολών
help.gettingStarted.palette.content:
Fast navigation

Press Ctrl+K (Windows/Linux) or Cmd+K (macOS) to open the command palette. Αναζήτηση views, AI actions, theme toggles, and pinned favorites. Right-click a command to pin it.

Customize chords under Ρυθμίσεις → Shortcuts. Conflicts are highlighted in amber.
help.gettingStarted.palette.title: Παλέτα εντολών και συντομεύσεις
help.gettingStarted.tour.content:
Καλώς ήρθατε to StoryCraft Studio!

The main navigation is on the left sidebar, giving you access to all core tools:

  • Πίνακας Ελέγχου: Your project's home base. Track stats, set goals, and see your project at a glance.
  • Χειρόγραφο: A focused, three-panel view for writing and organizing your chapters.
  • AI Writing Studio: Your creative partner for generating text, improving prose, and overcoming writer's block.
  • Templates: Jumpstart your story with pre-built narrative structures.
  • Σχεδιάγραμμα Generator: Brainstorm a complete plot from a simple idea using AI.
  • Characters & Κόσμος Building: Δημιουργία and manage your story's assets with rich details and AI-generated art.
  • Εξαγωγή: Prepare your finished work for sharing in various formats.
  • Ρυθμίσεις: Customize your workspace and manage your project data.
help.gettingStarted.tour.title: Μια γρήγορη περιήγηση στη διεπαφή
help.management.backupDashboard.content:
Πίνακας Ελέγχου Backup Quick Actions

The Backup card on the Πίνακας Ελέγχου gives you one-click access to the most common data-safety actions without navigating away from your project overview.

  • Εξαγωγή JSON: Click Εξαγωγή backup to download a complete JSON snapshot of your entire project — all manuscript text, characters, worlds, settings, and scene board layout. Use this to move the project to another device or as a manual archive.
  • Import backup: Click Import backup to load a previously exported JSON file. This replaces the current project, so a confirmation dialog appears first.
  • Latest snapshot: The card shows the name and timestamp of the most recent auto-snapshot. Click it to open the Version Control panel where you can compare, restore, or label that snapshot.
  • Jump to full settings: The Ρυθμίσεις → link at the bottom of the card takes you directly to Ρυθμίσεις → Backup & Data for advanced options: auto-snapshot interval, encryption passphrase, encrypted library ZIP export, and cross-project index rebuild.
  • Snapshot count: A small badge shows how many snapshots exist. Auto-snapshots beyond the limit of 20 are pruned oldest-first; manual snapshots are never pruned automatically.
help.management.backupDashboard.title: Πίνακας Ελέγχου backup quick actions
help.management.collaboration.content:
Collaboration (Experimental)

Real-time collaborative editing via Yjs and y-webrtc. Multiple writers can edit the same manuscript simultaneously with automatic conflict resolution. Enable the feature flag, then configure under Ρυθμίσεις → Collaboration.

  • Signaling server: Enter a WebRTC signaling URL in Ρυθμίσεις → Collaboration. Use the public wss://signaling.yjs.dev for testing, or host your own server.
  • Room ID: Share the room ID with co-authors. All writers in the same room ID connect automatically. The room is identified by a SHA-256 hash of the project and room name.
  • E2E encryption: Set a room password to enable end-to-end encryption. All Yjs updates are encrypted before leaving the browser. The green lock badge in the panel confirms encryption is active.
  • Cursor positions: Other writers' cursors appear as coloured carets in the Χειρόγραφο editor in real time.
  • Limitations: Sessions are peer-to-peer — no central server holds the document. Offline sync (merge later) is not yet supported. If all peers disconnect, the session ends.
help.management.collaboration.title: Συνεργασία (πειραματική)
help.management.data.content:
Your Data, Your Control

You can manage your project data in Ρυθμίσεις > Data & Backups. StoryCraft Studio gives you full control:

  • Εξαγωγή Backup: This saves a complete JSON backup file of your entire project (including all text and settings) to your computer. Use this to move your project to another device.
  • Import Backup: Load a project from a JSON backup file.
  • Reset Project: This will permanently delete all your data in the browser and start a new, blank project.
  • Project Snapshots: This powerful feature is your safety net. The app automatically takes snapshots of your project periodically. You can also create a named snapshot manually before making major changes. You can restore your project to any snapshot at any time.
help.management.data.title: Διαχείριση δεδομένων & δημιουργία αντιγράφων ασφαλείας
help.management.export.content:
From Draft to Document

The Εξαγωγή view is a full publishing suite. You have a live preview of your formatted document on the right. In the 'Εξαγωγή Controls' panel, you can:

  • Select Content: Choose which parts of your project to include, such as Χαρακτήρας Dossiers or Κόσμος-Building notes.
  • Choose a Format: We support Markdown (.md), Plain Text (.txt), and PDF (.pdf).
  • Customize PDF: For PDFs, you can set the font, font size, line spacing, and choose whether to include a professional title page.
  • Use AI Enhancements: Check the 'Δημιουργία AI Synopsis' box to have the AI write a professional one-page summary of your entire manuscript to be included in the export.
help.management.export.title: Εξαγωγή της εργασίας σας
help.management.versionControl.content:
Version Control Panel

The Version Control panel (header icon or Ctrl+Shift+V) lets you manage project snapshots like lightweight commits — no branch merging, no remote server.

  • Auto-snapshots: Created every 30 minutes of active editing. Up to 20 auto-snapshots are kept; older ones are pruned automatically (FIFO).
  • Manual snapshots: Click Δημιουργία snapshot, enter a descriptive name (e.g., "Before Act 2 rewrite"), and confirm. Manual snapshots are never pruned automatically.
  • Diff view: Select any snapshot and click View diff to see a word-level diff against the current manuscript. Added text is green; removed text is red. Only changed sections are shown.
  • Restore: Click Restore on any snapshot to rewind to that point. A confirmation dialog lists what will change; a safety auto-snapshot of the current state is created first.
  • Branches: Click New branch to fork the current snapshot into an independent experimental branch. Switch branches from the panel header dropdown.
